CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(PersonMobilePhone), "", HYPERLINK("tel:" & PersonMobilePhone, IF(LEFT(PersonMobilePhone, 3) = "+55", IF(LEN(PersonMobilePhone) = 14, "+55 (" & MID(PersonMobilePhone, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(PersonMobilePhone, 6, 5) & "-" & MID(PersonMobilePhone, 11, 4), IF(LEN(PersonMobilePhone) = 13, "+55 (" & MID(PersonMobilePhone, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(PersonMobilePhone, 6, 4) & "-" & MID(PersonMobilePhone, 10, 4), PersonMobilePhone)), PersonMobilePhone)) & " " & HYPERLINK("https://wa.me/" & SUBSTITUTE(PersonMobilePhone, "+", ""), IMAGE("/resource/WhatsAppIcon", "WhatsApp", 20, 20)))
CustomField.label: Celular Pessoal (exibição)
